rooms.dialog: You've entered the ancient archive. Dusty scrolls line the walls, and there's a mysterious pedestal in the center with glowing runes.
The machinery hums with power. Gears turn in complex patterns, and steam hisses from copper pipes. A control panel awaits your input.
The crystal chamber resonates with mystical energy. Each crystal pulses with a different color, creating a mesmerizing light show. Ancient symbols glow on the floor.
The pedestal's runes react to your presence. A holographic map appears, showing the layout of the entire escape room complex.
